description: Toy Story Woody pull-string doll — electronics repair, mechanical repair, and cleaning and refresh.
itemDetails:
Toy Story Woody pull-string dolls are licensed Pixar/Disney products, with major production by Thinkway Toys across multiple film generations. The pull-string voice format became iconic from the original 1995 Toy Story release onward.

Construction usually combines a soft body with molded plastic head/hands/boots, stitched costume textiles, and an internal voice pull-cord module.
